title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Luffy, Reiju, Sanji as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone knows I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I whittled her down a notch or two.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Loose lips sink ships.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got about 30 minutes before the ceremony starts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are the straw hats ready to go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Take a look for yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're inside your own body, after all, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oi! Idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing sleeping?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What about the prepara- tions?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let them rest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They have barely had the chance to sit down since they got here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll wake them 10 minutes before it all begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Some- thing's wrong with you lot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you end up being a burden, I'll cut you all loose then and there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Stop worrying.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will take care of the preparations and will also keep watch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Those bastards... I'm actually shocked!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: get back in there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll walk into the hall myself! Get ready, you lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: After I step foot inside there,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's no going back!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: 9th floor bride and groom's room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I... I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had no intention of marrying when I arrived here, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that I'm sitting here next to you

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is so strange... I almost feel as if I'm in a dream.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well, is that dream

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A good one?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Or a bad one?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So cute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: 0- 0- of course a good one!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Keep it together, Sanji! She's just acting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Really? I'm glad. :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She's actually trying to kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait... Maybe... Maybe I really was just dreaming all the other stuff!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Trust in your own memories!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sanji? What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! UH- N- NOTHING! I... uh... Oh yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our big kiss... well... uh... if you're, well... if you don't want to, in front of everyone and all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be okay with kissing you on your forehead or something... or somewhere else, you know... I mean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: kiss me on the mouth, silly. :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to be husband and wife, aren't we?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oi! What the hell was that noise?!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Lord Sanji crashed into the wall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The wall?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's bleeding like mad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: OH NO! SANJ!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hell is with this pervert?! I wanna kill him right now!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
